regional_cost_note: Demolition contractors in Auckland typically charge $3,500–$14,000 for an internal strip-out and $16,000–$40,000+ for a full house demolition. Asbestos removal is priced separately at $85–$220/m². Auckland rates are the highest in NZ, reflecting the city's cost of living and high demand. Asbestos testing is mandatory before any demolition work on pre-1990 buildings.
